context: Tests whether the agent implements an RFM scoring pipeline using the correct data model, quintile-based scoring algorithm, score inversion for recency, and the prescribed segment classification logic and labels.

checklist.name: SubscriberProfile data model
checklist.description: Defines a SubscriberProfile (or equivalent) type/interface that includes all three RFM-related fields: lastOrderDate (or equivalent recency), orderCount (or equivalent frequency), and totalRevenue (or equivalent monetary)

checklist.name: Engagement fields in model
checklist.description: Data model includes openRate computed as totalOpened / totalSent (or equivalent), and clickRate computed as totalClicked / totalSent

checklist.name: Quintile breakpoint computation
checklist.description: Scoring uses quintile breakpoints (percentiles at 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%) rather than manually chosen absolute thresholds to split the distribution

checklist.name: R score inversion
checklist.description: Recency score is inverted so that a lower number of days since last order yields a higher score (e.g., score 5 for most recent)

checklist.name: Scores on 1-5 scale
checklist.description: R, F, and M dimensions are each scored on a 1–5 integer scale

checklist.name: Champions classification rule
checklist.description: Segment 'champions' is assigned when r >= 4 AND f >= 4 AND m >= 4

checklist.name: cant-lose classification rule
checklist.description: Segment 'cant-lose' (or equivalent label) is assigned for subscribers with low recency score (r <= 2) but medium-high monetary score (m >= 3)

checklist.name: All 8 RFM segment labels present
checklist.description: Code defines or uses all 8 segment labels: 'champions', 'loyal', 'potential-loyal', 'new-customers', 'at-risk', 'cant-lose', 'hibernating', 'lost'

checklist.name: marketingConsent filter
checklist.description: RFM computation only processes subscribers where marketingConsent is true and unsubscribedAt is null/absent

checklist.name: Currency normalization
checklist.description: Monetary values are normalized to a single base currency before computing the M score (e.g., the code handles or documents multi-currency normalization)

checklist.name: Nightly recompute scheduling
checklist.description: The solution includes or documents a scheduled/nightly job to recompute RFM scores (e.g., cron, scheduled task, or comment specifying daily refresh)

checklist.name: Bulk upsert output
checklist.description: Computed RFM scores are written to a persistent store (database upsert, output file, or returned collection) rather than just logged to console
